description: Consolidated spec tracker — cross-references spec files, attestations, plans, metric JSONs, and CSV status to determine real completion status of all specified tasks.

summary.note: PG-018 has two spec versions (sprint-12 = SPEC_ONLY, sprint-13 = COMPLETED). PG-031 has cross-sprint spec (sprint-0 spec, sprint-14 execution). Both counted once in totals using their canonical completed version.

status_legend.COMPLETED: All evidence confirms task is done: attestation present, CSV=Completed, plan checkboxes done
status_legend.PARTIALLY_DONE: Some evidence of completion but gaps identified (missing attestation, failing tests, unwired code)
status_legend.SPEC_ONLY: Spec exists but no execution evidence (no attestation, no plan completion, CSV=Backlog)

issues.issue: CSV says Completed at 100% but NO attestation file exists. Plan has 0/25 checkboxes checked. Documents Management eSign may not be truly implemented.
issues.recommendation: Verify actual codebase for eSign implementation. Run /exec or /matop-execute to generate proper attestation.

issues.issue: Initial monitoring modules (DriftDetector, HallucinationChecker, LatencyMonitor, ROITracker) built per 2025-12-29 attestation, but 2026-01-31 spec session found ChainMonitor integration into scoring.chain.ts was never executed. All 5 P0 ACs remain unchecked.
issues.recommendation: Wire ChainMonitor into scoring.chain.ts and re-run attestation.

issues.issue: 95% implemented with COMPLETE attestation for hexagonal restructuring, but spec updated 2026-02-01 documents 2 critical gaps: inboundEmailRouter not wired to appRouter, E2E inbound email webhook test missing.
issues.recommendation: Wire inboundEmailRouter and add E2E test.

issues.issue: Sprint-11 summary marks DONE and CSV=Completed, but attestation verdict is INCOMPLETE with pnpm test:e2e exit code 1. All 9 DoD criteria listed as unverified.
issues.recommendation: Fix failing E2E tests, re-run attestation to get COMPLETE verdict.

issues.issue: Sprint-12 spec has no plan, attestation, or metric JSON (SPEC_ONLY). Sprint-13 spec has COMPLETE attestation. CSV shows Completed in sprint 13. The sprint-12 version is an orphaned early draft.
issues.recommendation: No action needed — sprint-13 version is the canonical completed implementation.

issues.issue: CSV shows Backlog at 0%, metric JSON shows BACKLOG. Attestation directory has context_ack.json with COMPLETE verdict, but this appears to be from spec session only — not exec completion.
issues.recommendation: Run /exec PG-033 to implement the Scalar API docs page.

issues.issue: CSV shows Backlog at 0%. context_ack.json notes 'Re-run to verify PASS consensus'. No plan file found. Attestation is from planning phase only.
issues.recommendation: Run /exec IFC-070 when ready for data migration implementation.

issues.issue: Attestation COMPLETE and metric JSON DONE, but CSV shows only 75% complete. Likely a CSV update lag.
issues.recommendation: Update CSV to 100% to match attestation and metric evidence.
